label: Starter
meaning: The student needs concept rebuilding and guided practice before heavy mock testing.
nextStep: Use topic worksheets, daily checklist and short untimed practice.

label: Building
meaning: The student understands some areas but loses marks through gaps, weak timing or inconsistent method.
nextStep: Use mixed practice, common mistake review and section mocks.

label: Competitive
meaning: The student has a workable base and should now improve speed, accuracy and weak-topic recovery.
nextStep: Use timed mocks, error logs and weekly revision cycles.

label: Advanced
meaning: The student is strong but still needs exam temperament, precision and full-length simulation.
nextStep: Use full mocks, difficult mixed sets and final revision sheets.
